_source: Extracted from string constants in kws250.exe (Knitware Sweater Design 2.50, 2005). Each rule carries the verbatim original message for traceability.
_status: DRAFT — hand-encoded from the extracted strings. The `text` field is verbatim and authoritative. The structured `forbid`/`require` encoding is an INTERPRETATION and must be checked against reference/sweaters/manual.txt before being trusted. Where the encoding is uncertain, `confidence` is set to 'low'.
_why_these_matter: These are geometric and physical facts about how knitted garments go together, not stylistic preferences. Reproducing them from theory would be guesswork.

_schema.forbid: list of {field: [values]} clauses — the combination is invalid if ALL clauses match

rules.text: Cannot have Cap Sleeve or Sleeveless with Round Yoke Shoulder.
Saddle Shoulder cannot have cap sleeve or sleeveless.
Modified Drop Shoulder cannot have cap sleeve or sleeveless.
Cannot have cap sleeve with raglan shoulder.
Drop Shoulder Grafted cannot be Sleeveless.
Raglan shoulder cannot have boat neckline.
Saddle shoulder cannot have boat or flat front or shallow neckline or backless.
rules.note: Parsing ambiguity: 'boat or flat front or shallow neckline or backless' — unclear whether 'boat' binds to front only. Check manual.

rules.text: Drop shoulder cannot be Backless.
Backless style must be sleeveless also.
Cannot have hood, turtleneck, cowl or shawl collar with Set-in Backless Style.
Cannot have Shirt Collar with Backless style on a Set-in Shoulder.
Dolman Sleeve must have drop shoulder.
Dolman Sleeve must have full, 3/4 or half length sleeve style.
Cannot have Fitted Waist body style with Dolman Sleeve.
Top-down construction must have Raglan or Round Yoke Shoulder.
Cannot have sleeveless style with Top-Down Construction.
Cannot have Round Yoke shoulder with Flat construction.
Cannot have Circular Construction Method with machine knit.
Cannot have back neck shaping with Circular Raglan or Yoke.
rules.note: 'back neck shaping' presumably means anything other than flat/shallow/backless. Verify.

rules.text: Cannot have a boat or keyhole neckline on a cardigan.
Cannot have a cowl or turtlenck collar on a cardigan.
rules.note: 'turtlenck' is a typo in the original.

rules.text: Cannot have Keyhole style on Back Neckline.
Cannot have Cowl collar on Keyhole Neckline.
Boat neck shaping must match on front and back.
Boat neck can only have single band collar.
Warning.  Overlap boat neck may not be suitable for drop shoulder or cap sleeve.
rules.note: WARNING not error — must not block generation.

rules.text: Back neck shaping must be flat, shallow or backless for Hoods.
Hood must have round, flat or shallow front neckline shaping.
Back neck shaping must be flat, shallow or backless for turtleneck or shawl collar.
Turtleneck collar must have round, flat or shallow front neckline shaping.
Shawl collar must have V or square front neckline shaping.
Cannot have Shirt Collar with Square Neck or V Back Neck shaping.
rules.note: Ambiguous: could mean square front OR v back. Check manual.

rules.text: If the body is knit by hand, then the ribbing must be by hand also.
If the body or ribbing is crocheted, then the other must be crocheted also.

engine_limits.text: The program cannot handle a decrease of greater than 3:1.
engine_limits.note: Original's limit. We are not bound by it, but exceeding it likely produces unknittable shaping. Treat as a warning threshold.

engine_limits.text: This calculator cannot handle an increase of greater than 2:1.
engine_limits.note: Applies to the round-yoke calculator specifically.

advisories.text: Unless your gauge is very loose, the rolled collar may not work very well in crochet.  Work a sample, perhaps on a larger hook size, to get the required drape.

round_yoke_calculator._note: Separate sub-calculator with its own rules. See reference/sweaters/constraints_raw.txt for the full list; these bound its inputs.
rules: First shaping round must be at round 1 or greater.
Last shaping round must be at least one round less than total number of rounds in yoke.
Number of sts at top must be less than number of sts at bottom.
Total number of rows must be greater than 3 times the number of shaping rounds.
Rounds must be increasing order, at least 2 rounds between them.
Fixed Repeat 'above round' must match bottom round or an existing 'Shaping Round'.
